name: Daniel Bekele
review: Henok is one of those rare engineers who can ship a feature, debug a production incident, and explain the architecture to a non-technical stakeholder — all in the same afternoon. He's the first person I call when something has to work on the first try.

name: Sara Tesfaye
review: We brought Henok in to stabilize our incident response. Within six months our MTTR dropped by a third and our change failure rate halved. He builds systems that survive contact with reality.

name: Marcus Johnson
review: I hired Henok to build the mobile app for our patient platform. He delivered a polished product that our users genuinely love. His attention to UX detail is unusual for a backend-leaning engineer.
